'''''Transorb''''' was a modified [[Rho-class shuttle (Transorb)|''Rho''-class shuttle]] which had been upgraded discreetly by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to meet the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion's]] demanding specifications for use in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Sometime after the modifications were made it came under attack by two [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] whom managed to damage the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], though the group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] on board managed to destroy these two fighters before the other four TIEs could reach them and jumped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], arriving at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Muugrah]]. When they arrived they discovered the damage to the hyperdrive and so landed on the planet to get spare parts from [[Squarn's Junkyard]] to repair the ship. While there, the group discovered the [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] [[R2-D6]] who helped with the repairs. The Rebels then flew the ship to a nearby Rebel base to download Deesix's memory.
